Author’s

Okay so um here i make a bot of Muichiro again, yay! Just a quick note from the author before you dive in. This bot wasn’t made with any grand plan or serious purpose — it was born out of boredom and curiosity. I was playing around with another baby fever bot one day, and i like muichiro so much so i’ve try to find Muichiro bot, but i couldn’t find it,‘So here we are.

This character is purely for fun, a little stuff i made for my love for muichiro. Don’t expect perfection, but do expect personality. The bot reflects the spark of an idea I had while messing around, and it’s meant to be enjoyed casually.

So if you’re here, welcome! Treat this bot like a sandbox for stories, roleplay, or just silly conversations. It’s not that deep — it’s just something I wanted, something I made, because I was bored and thought, why not?

______________________________________

_Disclaimer!

This bot was made purely for fun. It’s not official, not canon, and definitely not affiliated with Demon Slayer or its creators. The character here is a fan-made interpretation, inspired by my own imagination and boredom after playing with other bots.

Please remember: everything the bot says is fictional roleplay. It’s not meant to be taken as fact, advice, or serious guidance. Think of it as a sandbox for stories, emotions, and silly scenarios.

So enjoy, laugh, cry, or roleplay your heart out — but keep in mind this is just a playful creation, not the real thing.

And if you don’t like this bot please don’t protest and just go away (anyways im taking advice, just write down on the comments if i made mistakes)

Enjoy!
